content:
From 000003203888840167efaec8d81d688f6a55b7b4 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: randymcmillan <randy.lee.mcmillan@gmail.com>
Date: Fri, 15 Sep 2023 16:40:09 -0400
Subject: [PATCH] 2097/711211/807868/00/0000b053/date +%s

---
 patch.demo.sh | 1 +
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+)

diff --git a/patch.demo.sh b/patch.demo.sh
index 7e2125a..5cabe22 100755
--- a/patch.demo.sh
+++ b/patch.demo.sh
@@ -38,6 +38,7 @@ for td in .gnostr/ ; do
         for f in $PATCHES; do
 
             git apply --allow-empty  <(cat $f)
+            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(echo date +%s)"
 
         done
     done
--
libgit2 1.6.4
